moments.title: The Open at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is held at Royal Birkdale from 16 to 19 July 2026

angles.name: Golf's biggest stage
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are heading to Royal Birkdale for The Open, who will you be backing?

angles.name: Major momentum
angles.copy: The Open is just around the corner, can the favourites live up to the hype?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale ready
angles.copy: The stage is set at Royal Birkdale, will this be the year a new star emerges in golf?

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow from 23 July to 2 August 2026

angles.name: Scotland's moment
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are coming to Glasgow, a chance for Scotland's athletes to shine on the biggest stage

angles.name: Global gathering
angles.copy: The best athletes from around the Commonwealth will descend on Glasgow, who will be the stars of the show?

angles.name: Glasgow's ready
angles.copy: The city is buzzing with excitement as the Commonwealth Games get ready to kick off in Glasgow

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show runs from 20 to 23 July 2026 at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells

angles.name: Agricultural showcase
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a celebration of the best of Welsh farming and countryside, don't miss it

angles.name: Rural delight
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a must-visit event for anyone who loves the countryside and rural life

angles.name: Welsh pride
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a chance to celebrate all things Welsh, from farming to food and more

moments.title: National Eisteddfod of Wales
moments.blurb: The National Eisteddfod comes to North Pembrokeshire from 1 to 8 August 2026

angles.name: Welsh language and culture
angles.copy: The National Eisteddfod is a celebration of Welsh language, music, and culture, don't miss it

angles.name: Pembrokeshire's pride
angles.copy: The National Eisteddfod is coming to North Pembrokeshire, a chance to showcase the best of Welsh talent

angles.name: Festival of Wales
angles.copy: The National Eisteddfod is a festival like no other, a true celebration of all things Welsh

moments.title: Sidmouth Folk Festival
moments.blurb: The 72nd Sidmouth Folk Festival takes over the Devon seaside town from 31 July to 7 August 2026

angles.name: Folk music heaven
angles.copy: The Sidmouth Folk Festival is a must-visit event for folk music fans, with a lineup of amazing artists

angles.name: Devon's folk delight
angles.copy: The Sidmouth Folk Festival is a celebration of folk music and culture in the heart of Devon

angles.name: Seaside festival fun
angles.copy: The Sidmouth Folk Festival is a unique and exciting event that combines folk music with seaside fun
